## Summary / 变更说明

Briefly describe what this PR changes.
请简要说明这次 PR 做了什么。

## Type Of Change / 改动类型

- [ ] Bug fix / Bug 修复
- [ ] New feature / 新功能
- [ ] Content update / 内容更新
- [ ] Style adjustment / 样式调整
- [ ] Refactor / 重构
- [ ] Documentation update / 文档更新

## Related Issue / 关联 Issue

Please include the related issue, for example: `Closes #123`
请填写关联的 Issue，例如：`Closes #123`

## Verification / 自测说明

Describe what you verified before submitting.
请说明你做了哪些验证。

- [ ] Runs normally in local environment / 本地运行正常
- [ ] Key pages have been checked manually / 关键页面已手动检查
- [ ] No obvious errors found / 未发现明显报错

## Screenshots Or Recordings / 截图或录屏

If this PR includes UI or interaction changes, attach screenshots or a screen recording.
如果包含页面或交互改动，请附上截图或录屏。

## Additional Notes / 其他说明

Add anything that needs special reviewer attention here.
如有需要 reviewer 特别关注的点，请补充在这里。
